lines.en: President
Now, the usual trend info.
Study it properly.
Image strategy starts with knowing
the trends. Let's check the trend info
Trends change day by day.
Trend info is how you read the future.
Sometimes returning to basics matters.
Find your path in the trend info.
Good morning. We may be on vacation,
but you still want your trend info.
Even while we're on break, the trends
keep changing. Let's at least check.
A little jolt for those lazy heads:
the trend info check. Pay attention.
Watching the dizzying whirl of trends
at our leisure... How elegant.
Eri. To put this info to use, first
you must stop freezing up in public.
Eri
Y-Yes. Not getting nervous...
I'll try my best...
Using the info, making it your own...
I know you can do it, Eri. Good luck.
Okay... I'll give it lots of thought.
Eri. You've likely noticed, but at
times it pays to defy the trends.
Right. Only chasing after them
isn't enough... I understand.
Strong as you are now, Eri, trends
can be your tailwind. I trust you.
Yes. I'll make sure they don't
turn into a headwind...
You don't need my input anymore. I'll
happily watch the path you choose.
Okay... Just watch me. Someday,
a stage that's mine alone...!
That's about it. Use it well.
Okay, I will...
Okay. Input... complete?
Also... I've added an 'Audition'
to your schedule.
Your first audition since your
idol debut. Do your best.
Give it everything, no regrets.
So many dreams ride on you...!
Whether you pass depends on your work
and the 'Memories' you've woven.
It's work, of course. But above all,
do your best for your own sake.
Dawdle too long, and you're just
waiting for your rivals to grow, hm?
Don't break yourself, but hit that
wall like you mean to smash it. Yes?
Vacation's nearly over. Let's make
the finale fun and flashy.
Also, just as a reminder: you are
currently entered in an audition.
This audition will decide where you
go from here. Stay sharp.
To keep good memories of this island,
face it with nothing left undone.
Now, about your current chances
of passing the audition...
A shame. Every lesson is still far
short of passing level. Work harder.
Dance is fine... but the rest looks
shaky. You can tell yourself, no?
As for your chances...
Vocal is fine... but the rest looks
Visual is fine... but the rest looks
That leaves Dance. If only you
could manage that...
That leaves Vocal. If only you
That leaves Visual. If only you
You've had lessons enough. Now, how
brightly can you shine... Showtime.
I'll mail you info as it comes,
so check it properly. Dismissed.
If anything comes to mind later,
I'll mail you. Now, get to work.
Think and act for yourself. That's
how lessons stick. Try everything.
Everyone's hard work has this office
buzzing. I expect great things!
It's a vacation. Spend your time on
whatever you like. Dismissed.
Hm, lessons? If you want, go ahead.
I've arranged some nearby. Enjoy♪
Well then, dismissed. Have fun.
Oh, and later... who'll oil me up?
Work hard, then play twice as hard!
...I like it. Our new company motto?
The trend image shows you what idols
everywhere value most right now.
To ride a trend, you must polish
your own image to match it.
To polish an image, it's best to
repeat the lessons that match it.
Your stage costume and chosen song
can also change your image.
First, for the week ahead, let's
choose your costume and song.
The costume and song you choose
will shape your image, too.
Think hard about which costume and
song will put you on the trend.
Well. I let you spend a week freely
on lessons and promo work...
So? Are you getting a feel for
an idol's work?
Yeah... I guess
I see. Then there's nothing more
I need to say.
Do things the way you want to.
Every experience is a treasure. Go on.
Now then, shall we start the meeting?
...Yeah
So many things to track...
You seem a bit overwhelmed.
Listen, and remember this well:
image level and Memories matter most.
You can raise your image level
by taking lessons.
Memories grow as you do promo work.
Keep up lessons and promo work,
and the road to auditions opens...
Promo jobs needed to enter auditions
are marked with a '!' symbol.
The rest is yours: trial and error.
